thesis: NVDA AI accelerator demand sustains >50% data-center growth
article_title: Nvidia beats Q4 estimates, raises guidance on Blackwell demand
description: Nvidia reported $39B in revenue, ahead of consensus, citing record data-center demand for its Blackwell GPUs. Guidance for next quarter implies continued sequential growth.

thesis: NVDA AI accelerator demand sustains >50% data-center growth
article_title: DeepSeek model trains for $5M, raising questions on AI capex needs
description: Chinese startup DeepSeek released a frontier-quality model trained on a fraction of the compute used by US labs, prompting questions about whether hyperscaler GPU spending can sustain.

thesis: NVDA AI accelerator demand sustains >50% data-center growth
article_title: Nvidia headquarters wins architecture award
description: The chipmaker's Santa Clara headquarters was recognized at an architectural design competition.

thesis: AAPL services growth offsets hardware deceleration; China is largest risk
article_title: Apple iPhone sales in China decline 18% YoY
description: Counterpoint Research data shows Apple lost share to Huawei in Q4, with shipments down 18%. China now contributes a smaller mix of total revenue.

thesis: AAPL services growth offsets hardware deceleration; China is largest risk
article_title: Apple services revenue hits record $26B in Q4
description: Services revenue grew 14% YoY to a quarterly record, with App Store, advertising, and cloud all contributing. Services margin expanded to 75%.

thesis: TSLA EV demand sensitive to IRA tax credits and China competition
article_title: Trump administration moves to repeal $7,500 EV tax credit
description: Draft legislation would end the consumer EV credit established under the Inflation Reduction Act. Tesla would lose the largest single demand subsidy in the US market.
notes: Direct policy hit on named risk.

thesis: TSLA EV demand sensitive to IRA tax credits and China competition
article_title: Tesla Q1 deliveries down 13% YoY, miss consensus
description: Tesla delivered 337K vehicles in Q1, below analyst expectations of 390K. The company cited Cybertruck factory upgrades and softer demand.

thesis: TSLA EV demand sensitive to IRA tax credits and China competition
article_title: Tesla unveils robotaxi prototype at Hollywood event
description: Musk previewed a two-seat Cybercab without steering wheel or pedals, targeting 2026 production. Wall Street reaction mixed; timeline considered aggressive.

thesis: Lilly GLP-1 franchise drives multi-year growth; pipeline catalysts ahead
article_title: Lilly oral GLP-1 hits primary endpoint in Phase 3
description: Orforglipron demonstrated 15% weight loss at 36 weeks, comparable to injectable Zepbound. Pill formulation expected to dramatically expand TAM.

thesis: Lilly GLP-1 franchise drives multi-year growth; pipeline catalysts ahead
article_title: Compounded GLP-1 alternatives surge as FDA ruling delayed
description: Telehealth providers continue marketing compounded semaglutide and tirzepatide as FDA enforcement remains in flux. Lilly has sued multiple sellers.

thesis: JPM benefits from higher-for-longer rates; NII tailwinds
article_title: Fed signals two cuts in 2026, faster than prior dot plot
description: FOMC statement and Powell presser shifted dovish, with median dot now showing 50bps of cuts in 2026 vs prior 25bps.

thesis: JPM benefits from higher-for-longer rates; NII tailwinds
article_title: JPMorgan announces $30B accelerated buyback
description: Board authorized increased capital return after passing CCAR with surplus capital. Per-share metrics expected to benefit.

thesis: Exxon benefits from capital discipline and structurally undersupplied oil
article_title: OPEC+ extends production cuts through Q3
description: Saudi Arabia and Russia agreed to extend voluntary 2.2M bpd cuts. Brent rallied 3% on the news.

thesis: Exxon benefits from capital discipline and structurally undersupplied oil
article_title: Permian gas takeaway constraints worsen, prices go negative
description: Waha hub natural gas prices traded below zero again as gas-to-oil ratios rise in the basin and pipeline capacity lags.
notes: Negative for associated-gas economics but oil thesis intact; net mild.

thesis: Lockheed defense backlog grows on sustained geopolitical demand
article_title: F-35 program awarded $30B lot 18-19 contract
description: DoD finalized largest single Lockheed contract in program history. Deliveries through 2030.

thesis: Lockheed defense backlog grows on sustained geopolitical demand
article_title: Ukraine ceasefire framework gains momentum at Riyadh talks
description: Diplomats reported progress on territorial swap framework. Defense stocks sold off on the headline.

thesis: Coinbase benefits from crypto regulatory clarity post-election
article_title: SEC officially rescinds SAB-121, banks can custody crypto
description: New SEC accounting bulletin reverses the controversial rule that had kept large banks out of digital-asset custody. Industry view: bullish for institutional adoption.

thesis: Coinbase benefits from crypto regulatory clarity post-election
article_title: Bitcoin drops 9% on macro risk-off; Coinbase volumes spike
description: Crypto-wide selloff drove record retail volumes on Coinbase. Trading revenue benefit short-term but holdings impair.
notes: Cross-cut — volume up, asset values down.

thesis: Meta Reels + AI ads + Reality Labs; antitrust + KOSA are main risks
article_title: FTC v Meta antitrust trial concludes, ruling expected Q3
description: Closing arguments in the Instagram/WhatsApp divestiture case. Analysts split on outcome but consider divestiture risk material.

thesis: Meta Reels + AI ads + Reality Labs; antitrust + KOSA are main risks
article_title: Meta Q4 ad revenue beats, AI targeting drives ROAS lift
description: Advertising revenue grew 21% YoY, with management citing Andromeda recommendation system as a 5-10% conversion lift for advertisers.

thesis: Boeing 737 Max ramp recovery + China deliveries resuming
article_title: FAA extends 737 Max production cap, no near-term increase
description: FAA reaffirmed 38/month cap after additional quality findings, pushing back ramp timeline by at least a quarter.

thesis: Boeing 737 Max ramp recovery + China deliveries resuming
article_title: Air China places order for 100 additional 737 Max aircraft
description: Largest Chinese order since 2017 grounding. Deliveries phased through 2030.

thesis: TSM monopoly on leading-edge; AI demand sustains pricing; AZ derisks geopolitics
article_title: TSMC raises capex guidance to $42B citing AI demand
description: Above prior $34-36B range. Allocation skewed to N3 and N2 leading-edge nodes.

thesis: TSM monopoly on leading-edge; AI demand sustains pricing; AZ derisks geopolitics
article_title: China conducts military exercises around Taiwan; market reaction muted
description: PLA staged joint air-sea exercises encircling the island. Defense officials describe as routine; markets brushed off.
notes: Tail risk increment, even if market shrugged.

thesis: Lilly GLP-1 franchise drives multi-year growth; pipeline catalysts ahead
article_title: CMS adds tirzepatide to IRA negotiation list for 2027
description: Mounjaro and Zepbound included in the next round of Medicare price negotiation. Implementation in 2027 prices.

thesis: NextEra benefits from IRA production credits + transmission permitting
article_title: FERC issues final rule on interregional transmission planning
description: Order 1920A finalized, requiring 20-year transmission planning and clarifying cost allocation. Renewable interconnection should accelerate.

thesis: NextEra benefits from IRA production credits + transmission permitting
article_title: House GOP budget resolution targets IRA clean-energy credits for repeal
description: Resolution proposes phasing out PTC/ITC over three years to fund tax cuts. Industry pushback significant.

thesis: Amazon: AWS recovery + retail margin expansion + ads scale; FTC + labor risks
article_title: AWS Q4 revenue grows 19%, reaccelerates
description: AWS posted $28B revenue, beating consensus, with management citing AI workload migration. Operating margin expanded.

thesis: Amazon: AWS recovery + retail margin expansion + ads scale; FTC + labor risks
article_title: FTC files motion for evidentiary expansion in Amazon antitrust case
description: Bureau of Competition expanded subpoenas to seller data and Buy Box algorithm. Trial pushed to late 2026.

thesis: Pfizer Seagen oncology integration drives medium-term growth
article_title: Padcev label expanded in first-line urothelial cancer
description: FDA expanded label for Seagen-acquired Padcev to first-line metastatic bladder cancer. Sales expected to ramp materially.
notes: Direct positive on the M&A thesis.

thesis: CrowdStrike retention holds post-outage; module expansion continues
article_title: Delta Airlines settles outage litigation with CrowdStrike for $0
description: Two-year-old litigation dismissed with no payment. Removes overhang.

thesis: CrowdStrike retention holds post-outage; module expansion continues
article_title: Microsoft Defender for Endpoint gains share in midmarket
description: Gartner data shows Microsoft taking endpoint share from pure-plays, citing cost bundling with E5.

thesis: Microsoft Azure AI workloads + Copilot monetization across O365
article_title: Microsoft Q2 Azure growth 31%, AI services contributing ~12pp
description: Azure grew faster than expected, with AI services accelerating. Capex guided up to fund continued AI capacity.

thesis: Microsoft Azure AI workloads + Copilot monetization across O365
article_title: Microsoft cancels several leased data-center contracts
description: TD Cowen report says Microsoft walked away from hundreds of MW of leased capacity, prompting questions on AI capex trajectory.
notes: Directly questions the AI capex thesis.

thesis: Unity gaming engine turnaround post-pricing reset
article_title: Unity reports Q4, beats consensus, raises 2026 guidance
description: Revenue grew 8% YoY with engine subscriptions stable. Management raised full-year guidance citing strong renewals.

thesis: Long-duration Treasury ETF: rates cuts ahead
article_title: Core PCE inflation accelerates to 2.9% YoY, hottest in six months
description: January core PCE came in above consensus. Fed funds futures pushed first cut from June to September.

thesis: Gold hedge against dollar debasement and fiscal deficits
article_title: PBOC adds 5 tonnes of gold to reserves in February
description: Sixteenth consecutive month of accumulation. Total holdings now 2,260 tonnes.
